title: Quantum Metrology and Precision Measurement

analysis.object: T684: Quantum Metrology and Precision Measurement depth analysis

standard_quantum_limit.description: SQL: 1/sqrt(N) precision; EML-2 classical measurement limit
standard_quantum_limit.reason: SQL is EML-2: classical measurement precision scales as EML-2 with N independent probes

heisenberg_limit.description: Heisenberg limit: 1/N precision; EML-3 entangled measurement exceeds EML-2 SQL
heisenberg_limit.reason: Heisenberg limit is EML-3: entangled probes exploit EML-3 quantum correlations for super-precision

quantum_advantage_metrology.description: Quantum metrology: EML-3 entanglement enables EML-2 super-precision; depth difference = advantage
quantum_advantage_metrology.reason: Metrology theorem: EML-3 input enables EML-2 output beyond classical EML-2 limit; depth > measurement
